blended.narrative: Deer Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 45".
